# Transcrição: 01-Client Attraction on Facebook

- **Duração:** 02:26

## [00:00 - 02:26]

Welcome to the attracting clients via social media module of this course. I'm Tanner Smith. I'm going to your host and I'm going to be excited to be talking to you about Facebook. Now Facebook is one of the OG social media platforms and there is still so much to be done here. Yes, you can still get customers. Yes, you can still get clients and leverage and use this platform organically. There's a reason why it continues to stay the top dog of social media platforms. There are over 3 billion monthly active users and of those monthly active users over 2 billion of them are daily active users. So this is still very much a platform that is very engaging, has a lot of followers, has a lot of eyeballs, a lot of traffic. So the chances are that your business, your dot, your program, your offer that you're creating to the world and the ideal customer that you're trying to attract is going to be on Facebook. Now if you've used Facebook before, right, this might come as a little bit of a surprise to you, but this is not for personal consumption. This is not for entertainment. This is not for, you know, humorous, engaging content. This is not for following your friends and staying in touch with your family members. No, you have to change your mindset and yes, you can use Facebook for that. Of course you can. But right here right now as a business owner, we need to talk about how to create a new paradigm and Facebook needs to become a tool. This is no longer going to be something where you are going to be consumer, a consumer of content. You're going to be a creator on this platform. And the goal of Facebook for your business is to connect with your ideal client, nurture them, create a relationship with them and get them to interact and engage with your personal page and ultimately get them onto your own list, acquire their data, potentially get them on a call, a conversation where you can offer them your services and create genuine impact and transformation in their lives. So Facebook essentially needs to be a tool and a resource for you as a business. It's no longer somewhere where you're going to go to just waste time, mindlessly scroll. You're going to have a tactic and a strategy behind everything that you do on this app moving forward. Let's dive right into how to use it, how to set it up, some of the best practices. And so you can actually start reaching out to people getting leads, getting clients, building your list and creating momentum. Let's go.
